bits.premise: His small-town Mississippi background and single mother prepared him for disappointment from the crowd.
Being a banker is humbling when denied loan applicants drive nicer trucks than he does.
In a small town, a grandmother's reputation can matter as much as a credit score.
Golfing on his bachelor trip prepared him for marriage because both are expensive, frustrating commitments.

lines.text: Hey guys, I am a banker.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm from a small town in Mississippi,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I was raised by a single mother, so you don't laugh at this set.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm used to disappointment.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Being a banker, you see a lot.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Nothing's quite as humbling as denying somebody for a loan,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and they pull off in the truck that's nicer than yours.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Being from a small town, it's kind of funny in my industry,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: your credit score and your grandma's reputation are pretty much the same thing.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, "Sir, you filed bankruptcy last year, but your nana made a mean apple pie,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So let's see what we can do.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm also married.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I got married last year.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Thank you. Thank you.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Um, I went on a bachelor trip with my buddies.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We went golfing, 'cause nothing says celebrating love,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: like, hating yourself for four hours silently.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: But golfing prepared me for marriage,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause both involved me spending a lot of money
lines.label: setup

lines.text: at something I'm not really good at.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And then waking up the next morning
lines.label: tag

lines.text: and deciding to try again, 'cause I like the challenge.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Thank you. That's my time.
lines.label: fluff
